metadata.reference: A. Tselin, M. Pogodaeva, S. Levchenko, A. Kalmykov, K. Garbuzov, A. Smirnov, V. Drachev. Exploring the dielectric function of platinum. Phys. Rev. B 110, 195130 (2024) (Numerical data kindly provided by Andrey Tselin)
metadata.comments: 80 nm Pt film on quartz, deposited by EB-PVD, characterized by spectroscopic ellipsometry and DFT calculations.
